---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Load image type: ...
2. Set noise to ...
3. Click ...
4. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots or error output

Paste any error message or screenshot here.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Install method: `pip install -r requirements.txt` / `pip install .`
- Image format being loaded: [e.g. DICOM, PNG]

## No patient data

Do not attach real DICOM files with patient information. Use synthetic or anonymised test data only.
